achievements.title: The Funk of 40,000 Years
achievements.description: Survive a thrilling performance in the graveyard of Stage I
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: A Good Story Can End Your Life
achievements.description: Close the book on some loathsome literature in the shack of Stage I
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Your Mother Stacks Chairs in Hell!
achievements.description: Perform a percussive exorcism in the shack of Stage I
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Food So Good, It's to Die For
achievements.description: Kick a poultry-geist out of Hell's kitchen in the interior of Stage II
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Who's "Garbage of Cesspool" Now?!
achievements.description: Take the wind out of some verdant vermin's whiskers in the sewers of Stage II
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: For God's Sake, Cut It Out!
achievements.description: Show some chainsaws who's sharper in the house of Stage III
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Chest-Bursting with Enthusiasm
achievements.description: Cure Princess Ki of her stomach bug(s) in the house of Stage III
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Take the Baphomet by the Horns
achievements.description: Subdue a sinister summoning in the church of Stage III
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Half-Man, Half-Insect - Total Ugliness!
achievements.description: Be a buzz-kill to a freakish fly in the mansion of Stage III
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Even Apparitions Have Appetites
achievements.description: Make a shadowy figure fork over its existence on the coast of Diamond Lake in Stage IV
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Werewolves Aren't Yokai
achievements.description: Help Tarosuke with his flea problem in the cabin of Stage V
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Meandering Moonlight Massacre
achievements.description: Ascend the creepy cliffs and reach the Hell House at the end of Stage VI
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Absolute Cinema, Namco!
achievements.description: Smash the Great Pumpkin King and save Jennifer in Stage VII
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Scrapping the Extended Cut
achievements.description: Beat the game without collecting either of the Crystal Balls and get the normal ending
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Has Your Story Truly Ended...
achievements.description: Beat the game with only 1 Crystal Ball collected and unlock the first half of the true ending
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Experience through Execution
achievements.description: Raise your life gauge to 6 points by earning 20 experience points in total
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Eat Your Heart Out, Voorhees!
achievements.description: Raise your life gauge to the maximum of 16 points by earning 380 experience points in total
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Don't Be Gassy Around Geisha
achievements.description: Complete your hidden Japanese journey in Stage III and receive the first Crystal Ball
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: Cleopatra's Naughty Pharaoh-mones
achievements.description: Complete your hidden Egyptian excursion in Stage VII and receive the second Crystal Ball
achievements.author: Rdannylor2

achievements.title: ...Or Has It Just Begun?
achievements.description: Beat the game with both of the Crystal Balls collected and unlock the full true ending
achievements.author: Rdannylor2
